name: foreUP Golf Course Management API
what_it_does: foreUP REST API for golf course management and tee time booking platform. Enables AI agents to manage tee time availability and reservations, process membership transactions, handle pro shop point-of-sale, manage food and beverage operations, retrieve player profiles and handicap data, handle tournament management, and integrate golf course data with marketing and communication systems.
use_cases: Managing tee time availability and booking from golf course reservation agents
Processing membership sign-ups and dues from golf membership management agents
Handling pro shop POS transactions from retail operations agents
Managing tournament registrations and scoring from golf event agents
not_for: Non-golf recreation without tee time and course management workflows
Golf equipment retail without course operation integration
Large golf management companies with custom enterprise PMS
best_when: A golf course or country club using foreUP wants AI agents to automate tee time booking, membership management, pro shop operations, and tournament coordination.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Member personal and financial data requires careful handling. Golf course food and beverage operations may require additional POS compliance.

auth.notes: foreUP uses API key authentication. Course-level credentials per golf facility. API access for integration partners. No granular scope control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — golf course management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-course monthly pricing; modules for tee time, POS, membership, F&B
pricing.notes: Park City, Utah company, founded 2012. Cloud-based golf management platform with 2,000+ golf courses. Comprehensive suite covering tee times, POS, F&B, and membership. Strong in daily fee and resort golf.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Member personal and financial data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No webhooks — requires polling for tee time and booking updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full course access
Limited public developer documentation — integration support primarily through partner program
agent_readiness.security_notes: Golf member and payment data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency only. Limited public documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Golf member and payment data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
